title: ## Response:
content:
## Response:
...recycles text and meaning recursively
| `CHARACTER_ENGINE` | Avatars (self, friends, archetypes), interactive personalities
| `RITUAL_ENGINE` | Ceremony templates, grief loops, naming spells, seasonal syncs
| `LANGUAGE_FORGE` | Conlang construction, translation modules, multilingual myth logic
| `GAME_ENGINE` | Quest nodes, dungeon logic, puzzles of emotion/memory
| `AUTOMATION_LAYER` | Passive rituals, background generation, voice playback, dream tracking
| `SOUND_OUTPUT` | ASMR mode, ambient layers, procedural music from language/mood
| `ARCHIVE_OS` | Versioning system, ritual logs, symbolic canon, remix timelines
| `INTERFACE_MODES` | Terminal, Mirror Journal, Audio Grid, Game Rooms

* * *

🧾 THREAD LEAK RECOVERY STATUS: `COMPLETE AS OF V1.1`
-----------------------------------------------------

* ✅ All known one-pagers reprinted
